name: Golden Gate Park
summary_en: Golden Gate Park's record is dominated by planning. The 1998 Golden Gate Park Master Plan, adopted by the Recreation and Park Commission on October 15, 1998 (Resolution 9810-141), was prepared by Royston Hanamoto Alley & Abey. A 2002-2003 EIR for the Concourse Authority projects addresses an underground parking facility and master-plan consistency, and a 2007 draft EIR covers the Golden Gate Park stables renovation. 1977 Recreation and Park Commission minutes award construction contract RP 672 for the park's Children's Quarters playground rehabilitation, "Award Amount: $394,000.00," and approve a rugby tournament at the Polo Field. The park is operated by the Recreation and Park Department, whose FY2025 budget line totals about $250M; no place-specific contract appears in the data.
